name: delivery-intelligence
description: AI-native delivery intelligence platform for engineering teams

scripts.postbuild: cp -r agents/requirement-gap/config dist/agents/requirement-gap/config && cp -r agents/test-case-generation/config dist/agents/test-case-generation/config && cp -r agents/regression-impact-map/config dist/agents/regression-impact-map/config && cp -r agents/release-readiness/config dist/agents/release-readiness/config && cp -r config dist/config
